fields.name: Sell-to Customer No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the customer.

fields.name: Document No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the return receipt.

fields.name: Line No.
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the line number.
The program fills in this field automatically and uses the number to keep track of the lines.
You cannot change the contents of this field because the document has already been posted.

fields.name: Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the line type.

fields.name: No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the involved entry or record, according to the specified number series.

fields.name: Location Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the location in which the return receipt line was registered.

fields.name: Posting Group
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the posting group that was used when the return receipt was posted.
The program copies the contents of this field from the Posting Group field in the Sales Line table.
You cannot change the contents of this field because the document has already been posted.

fields.name: Shipment Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies when items on the document are shipped or were shipped. A shipment date is usually calculated from a requested delivery date plus lead time.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies either the name of, or the description of, the item, general ledger account, or item charge.

fields.name: Description 2
fields.tooltip: Specifies information in addition to the description.

fields.name: Unit of Measure
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the item or resource's unit of measure, such as piece or hour.

fields.name: Quantity
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of units of the item, general ledger account, or item charge specified on the line.

fields.name: Unit Price
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the price of one unit of the item.
The program copies the contents of this field from the Unit Price field in the Sales Line table.
You cannot change the contents of this field because the document has already been posted.

fields.name: Unit Cost (LCY)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the cost, in LCY, of one unit of the item or resource on the line.

fields.name: VAT %
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the VAT percentage that is used on the original sales credit memo.
The program copies the contents of this field from the VAT % field in the Sales Line table.
You cannot change the contents of this field because the document has already been posted.

fields.name: Line Discount %
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the line discount percentage that was given for the items on the line.
The program copies the contents of this field from the Line Discount % field in the Sales Line table.
You cannot change the contents of this field because the document has already been posted.

fields.name: Allow Invoice Disc.
fields.tooltip:
Specifies that the return receipt line could have been included in an invoice discount calculation.
The program copies the contents of this field from the Allow Invoice Disc. field in the Sales Line table.
You cannot change the contents of this field because the document has already been posted.

fields.name: Gross Weight
fields.tooltip: Specifies the gross weight of one unit of the item. In the sales statistics window, the gross weight on the line is included in the total gross weight of all the lines for the particular sales document.

fields.name: Net Weight
fields.tooltip: Specifies the net weight of one unit of the item. In the sales statistics window, the net weight on the line is included in the total net weight of all the lines for the particular sales document.

fields.name: Units per Parcel
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of units per parcel of the item. In the sales statistics window, the number of units per parcel on the line helps to determine the total number of units for all the lines for the particular sales document.

fields.name: Unit Volume
fields.tooltip: Specifies the volume of one unit of the item. In the sales statistics window, the volume of one unit of the item on the line is included in the total volume of all the lines for the particular sales document.

fields.name: Appl.-to Item Entry
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the item ledger entry that the document or journal line is applied to.

fields.name: Item Rcpt. Entry No.
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the number of the item ledger entry associated with the return receipt line.
The program creates this number when the line is posted. The number is not displayed anywhere else in the program.
You cannot change the contents of this field because the document has already been posted.
Item Tracking
If the return receipt line carries multiple unique item tracking numbers when posted, this will result in one item ledger entry for each item tracking number. For such one-to-many relations, the Item Entry Relation table manages the relation to the item ledger entries in stead of the Item Rcpt. Entry No. field.

fields.name: Shortcut Dimension 1 Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for Shortcut Dimension 1, which is one of two global dimension codes that you set up in the General Ledger Setup window.

fields.name: Shortcut Dimension 2 Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for Shortcut Dimension 2, which is one of two global dimension codes that you set up in the General Ledger Setup window.

fields.name: Customer Price Group
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the customer price group used for the return receipt.
The program copies the contents of this field from the Customer Price Group field in the Sales Line table.
You cannot change the contents of this field because the document has already been posted.

fields.name: Job No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the related project.

fields.name: Work Type Code
fields.tooltip:
Belongs to the Job application area.
You cannot change the contents of this field because the document has already been posted.

fields.name: Quantity Invoiced
fields.tooltip: Specifies how many units of the item on the line have been posted as invoiced.

fields.name: Bill-to Customer No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the customer that you send or sent the invoice or credit memo to.

fields.name: Gen. Bus. Posting Group
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the code for the general business posting group that was used when this line was posted.
The program copies the contents of this field from the Gen. Bus. Posting Group field in the Sales Header table.
You cannot change the contents of this field because the document has already been posted.

fields.name: Gen. Prod. Posting Group
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the code for the general product posting group that you have assigned to the items on this line.
The program copies the contents of this field from the Item table or the G/L Account table.
You cannot change the code because the document has already been posted.

fields.name: VAT Calculation Type
fields.tooltip:
Specifies which VAT calculation type was used when this line was posted.
The program copies the contents of this field from the VAT Calculation Type field in the Sales Line table.
You cannot change the contents of this field because the document has already been posted.

fields.name: Transaction Type
fields.tooltip:
Shows the transaction type specified in the sales line that this line was posted from.
The program copies the contents of this field from the Transaction Type field in the Sales Line table.
You cannot change the contents of this field because the document has already been posted.

fields.name: Transport Method
fields.tooltip:
Shows the transport method specified in the sales line that this line was posted from.
The program copies the contents of this field from the Transport Method field in the Sales Line table.
You cannot change the contents of this field because the document has already been posted.

fields.name: Attached to Line No.
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the extended text line number that is attached to the sales line.
You cannot change the contents of this field because the document has already been posted.

fields.name: Exit Point
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the code of the port of exit through which you ship the items out of your country/region.
The program copies the contents of this field from the Exit Point field in the Sales Line table.
You cannot change the contents of this field because the document has already been posted.

fields.name: Area
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the area code used for the items in this line.
The program copies the code from the Area field in the Sales Line table.
You cannot change the contents of this field because the document has already been posted.

fields.name: Transaction Specification
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the code for the type of transaction specification used for the items on this line.
The program copies the contents of this field from the Transaction Specification field in the Sales Line table.
You cannot change the contents of this field because the document has already been posted.

fields.name: Tax Area Code
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the tax area code of the customer.
The program copies the code from the Tax Area Code field in the Sales Line table.
You cannot change the contents of this field because the document has already been posted.

fields.name: Tax Liable
fields.tooltip:
Specifies that sales to the customer entered on the return receipt header were liable to sales tax.
The program copies the contents of this field from the Tax Liable field in the Sales Line table.
You cannot change the contents of this field because the document has already been posted.

fields.name: Tax Group Code
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the code for the tax group of the item.
The program copies the contents of this field from the Tax Group Code field in the Sales Line table.
You cannot change the contents of this field because the document has already been posted.

fields.name: VAT Bus. Posting Group
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the code for the VAT business posting group of the customer.
The program copies the contents of this field from the VAT Bus. Posting Group field in the Sales Line table.
You cannot change the contents of this field because the document has already been posted.

fields.name: VAT Prod. Posting Group
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the code for the VAT product posting group of the item.
The program copies the contents of this field from the VAT Prod. Posting Group field in the Sales Line table.
You cannot change the contents of this field because the document has already been posted.

fields.name: Currency Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the currency code for the amount on this line.

fields.name: Blanket Order No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the blanket order that the record originates from.

fields.name: Blanket Order Line No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the blanket order line that the record originates from.

fields.name: VAT Base Amount
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the total net amount (excluding VAT) that the credit memo line consists of.
The program copies the contents of this field from the VAT Base Amount field in the Sales Line table.
You cannot change the contents of this field because the document has already been posted.

fields.name: Unit Cost
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the unit cost of the item on the line. The unit cost is expressed in the currency of the original sales transaction.
You cannot change the contents of this field because the document has already been posted.

fields.name: Posting Date
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the date the purchase header was posted.
The program copies the date from the Posting Date field on the purchase header.
You cannot change the posting date because the invoice has already been posted.

fields.name: Dimension Set ID
fields.tooltip:
Specifies a reference to a combination of dimension values. The actual values are stored in the Dimension Set Entry table.


Additional Information


You cannot change the contents of this field. Click the drop-down arrow to see the combination of posted dimension values.


The value 0 represents an empty dimension set.

fields.name: Variant Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the variant of the item on the line.

fields.name: Bin Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the bin where the items are picked or put away.

fields.name: Qty. per Unit of Measure
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the quantity per unit of measure of the items sold.
The program copies the contents of this field from the Qty. per Unit of Measure field in the Sales Line table.
You cannot change the contents of this field because the document has already been posted.

fields.name: Unit of Measure Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies how each unit of the item or resource is measured, such as in pieces or hours. By default, the value in the Base Unit of Measure field on the item or resource card is inserted.

fields.name: Quantity (Base)
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the number of units of the item specified on the line expressed in base units of measure.
The program copies the contents of this field from the Return Qty. to Receive (Base) field in the Sales Line table.
You cannot change the contents of this field because the document has already been posted.

fields.name: Qty. Invoiced (Base)
fields.tooltip:
Specifies how much of the quantity on the line has been invoiced. The quantity in this field is expressed in base units of measure.
The program automatically fills in this field by converting the contents of the Quantity Invoiced field into base units of measure.
You cannot change the contents of this field because the document has already been posted.

fields.name: FA Posting Date
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the FA posting date of the return receipt line.
You cannot change the contents of this field because the document has already been posted.

fields.name: Depreciation Book Code
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the depreciation book code on the return receipt line.
You cannot change the contents of this field because the document has already been posted.

fields.name: Depr. until FA Posting Date
fields.tooltip:
This field is only used if the type of the line is Fixed Asset. The field indicates whether depreciation was calculated until the FA posting date of the line. If the field contains a check mark, depreciation for the asset was posted for the period from the FA posting date of the previous FA ledger entry to the FA posting date of this return receipt line.
You cannot change the contents of the field because the document has already been posted.

fields.name: Duplicate in Depreciation Book
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the second depreciation book code if the return receipt line was posted to two separate depreciation books. The Depreciation Book Code field specifies the first depreciation book code.
You cannot change the contents of this field because the document has already been posted.

fields.name: Use Duplication List
fields.tooltip:
Specifies whether the purchase line was posted to all depreciation books that have a check mark in the Part of Duplication List field in the Depreciation Book table.
The program copies the contents of the field from the Use Duplication List field in the Sales Line table.
You cannot change the contents of this field because the document has already been posted.

fields.name: Responsibility Center
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the code for the responsibility center that serves this customer.
You cannot change the contents of the field because the document has already been posted.

fields.name: Item Category Code
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the item category code for the item in this return receipt line.
You cannot change the contents of this field because the document has already been posted.

fields.name: Nonstock
fields.tooltip: Specifies that this item is a catalog item.

fields.name: Purchasing Code
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the purchasing code for the item.
A purchasing code indicates the steps taken when the items on the line were purchased.
The program copies the contents of this field from the Purchasing Code field in the Sales Line table.
You cannot change the contents of this field because the document has already been posted.

fields.name: Item Reference No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the referenced item number.

fields.name: Return Qty. Rcd. Not Invd.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the quantity from the line that has been posted as received but that has not yet been posted as invoiced.

fields.name: Appl.-from Item Entry
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the item ledger entry that the document or journal line is applied from.

fields.name: Item Charge Base Amount
fields.tooltip: This field is used internally. Suggests item charge assignment by amount.

fields.name: Correction
fields.tooltip: Specifies that this return receipt line has been posted as a corrective entry.

fields.name: Return Order No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the return order number this line is associated with.

fields.name: Return Order Line No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the related return order line.

fields.name: Return Reason Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code explaining why the item was returned.

fields.name: Allow Line Disc.
fields.tooltip: Specifies that a line discount has been calculated for the price offered.

fields.name: Customer Disc. Group
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the customer discount group used on the invoice.
The program copies the code from the Customer Disc. Group field on the sales line.
You cannot change the customer discount group because the return receipt has already been posted.

fields.name: Sell-to Customer Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the customer.
